Functions for managing shared storage of Bluetooth device names, keys, pairing data, and settings.

# Purpose
The code is a C header file that defines a set of functions for managing shared storage of Bluetooth-related data between Profile (PRF) and Normal Firmware (FW). It provides an interface for storing and retrieving various types of Bluetooth data, including local device names, BLE root keys, BLE pairing data, BLE pinned addresses, and BT Classic pairing data. The functions allow for both reading from and writing to the shared storage, facilitating data persistence and retrieval across different components of the system.

Key functions include [`shared_prf_storage_get_local_device_name`](<#shared_prf_storage_get_local_device_name>) and [`shared_prf_storage_set_local_device_name`](<#shared_prf_storage_set_local_device_name>) for managing the local device name, [`shared_prf_storage_get_root_key`](<#shared_prf_storage_get_root_key>) and [`shared_prf_storage_set_root_keys`](<#shared_prf_storage_set_root_keys>) for handling BLE root keys, and [`shared_prf_storage_get_ble_pairing_data`](<#shared_prf_storage_get_ble_pairing_data>) and [`shared_prf_storage_store_ble_pairing_data`](<#shared_prf_storage_store_ble_pairing_data>) for BLE pairing information. The module also includes functions for managing BT Classic pairing data and a function to perform a factory reset by wiping all stored data. The header file is intended to be included in other C source files that require access to this shared storage functionality.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `bluetooth/bluetooth_types.h`
- `bluetooth/sm_types.h`
